arts.ttl: Report: Aston Villa believe they can persuade £10m player to join them instead of Arsenal before deadline day
arts.sum: Martin Odegaard has tried to convince the 18-year-old to join Arsenal 🤯

arts.ttl: “Wants to join Aston Villa” – Offer in from Monchi and player snubs others for Birmingham move
arts.sum: Earlier today, we covered a report from Villarreal’s local media which stated Aston Villa made an offer to sign Juan Foyth and then suddenly went cool on the idea of getting the Argentine defender. There’s a very good chance that’s due to Foyth’s fitness situation, with him still easing his way back into action after The post “Wants to join Aston Villa” – Offer in from Monchi and player snubs others for Birmingham move appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: I played for Aston Villa and Celtic - this is why Unai Emery's side can win Champions League - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: Stiliyan Petrov has opened up about his love for Aston Villa and Celtic - as both those teams prepare to face off in the Champions League on Wednesday night. Both teams are playing very good football, with two great managers.

arts.ttl: The £10m Celtic deal that has Alan Hutton worried
arts.sum: After Celtic announced the transfer, former Rangers defender, Alan Hutton, still sounds worried even though the striker has permanently left the club. But from a serious Celtic fan’s point of view, I can totally get it with the type of player that he is, and they want to kick on.”

arts.ttl: Can Donyell Malen, Andres Garcia and Jota play in Aston Villa v Celtic? UEFA rule explained
arts.sum: On their website, UEFA say: "Ahead of the knockout phase, clubs can register a maximum of three new players by 00:00 CET on 6 February 2025. The overall limit of 25 players on List A (the Champions League squad) remains, though, along with the quota of eight locally-trained players."

arts.ttl: Who could Aston Villa play in Champions League round of 16? Draw and opponents explained
arts.sum: Aston Villa have thoroughly enjoyed their return to the top table of European football this season, and they are well set to reach the last 16 on Matchday 8 of the league phase

arts.ttl: 3 key Celtic questions for Brendan Rodgers as Aston Villa Champions League clash throws up dilemmas
arts.sum: There's a lot for Celtic fans to ponder ahead of the mammoth clash with selection issues and potential last 24 rivals all in the mix

arts.ttl: Al-Nassr explore deal to buy Aston Villa’s Jhon Durán rather than Boniface
arts.sum: Talks held with Villa, who would want about £80m Villa more likely to land Chelsea’s Disasi than Félix Al-Nassr are exploring a deal to sign Aston Villa’s Jhon Durán instead of the Bayer Leverkusen striker Victor Boniface. Although an agreement is in place for Boniface to move to the Saudi Arabian club, there is confusion over whether the €70m transfer will go ahead. Al-Nassr, whose attack is led by Cristiano Ronaldo, are also looking at Durán and have held talks over a move for the Villa striker. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Five players who played for Aston Villa and Celtic
arts.sum: Aston Villa face Celtic for the first time this evening in a Champions League ‘Battle of Britain’ at Villa Park. Though it’s the first encounter between the sides, there’s plenty of shared history. Several stars have adorned the colours of both clubs and we’ve picked out five of the most memorable to have played for […] The post Five players who played for Aston Villa and Celtic first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Gabby Agbonlahor warns Aston Villa fans about Celtic ahead of Champions League clash
arts.sum: The Bhoys are 18th in the 36-man table on 12 points, with a +1 goal difference and one point behind Leverkusen, who occupy that final automatic spot – nine other teams are ahead of Celtic, including Villa. Agbonlahor warns Villa fans about Celtic ahead of Champions League clash
